'''âdh-v-h''' ('''dhavaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lob|lob]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lob|lob]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-v-h
|-
! Lemma
| dhavaha
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhavahithi|dhavahithi]] || [[word:dhavahiji|dhavahiji]] || [[word:dhavahishi|dhavahishi]] || [[word:dhavahi|dhavahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavahuthuth|dhavahuthuth]] || [[word:dhavahujuj|dhavahujuj]] || [[word:dhavahushush|dhavahushush]] || [[word:dhavah|dhavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavahuthu|dhavahuthu]] || [[word:dhavahuju|dhavahuju]] || [[word:dhavahushu|dhavahushu]] || [[word:dhavahu|dhavahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavahufuth|dhavahufuth]] || [[word:dhavahufuj|dhavahufuj]] || [[word:dhavahufush|dhavahufush]] || [[word:dhavahuf|dhavahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhavahethe|dhavahethe]] || [[word:dhavaheje|dhavaheje]] || [[word:dhavaheshe|dhavaheshe]] || [[word:dhavahe|dhavahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavahothoth|dhavahothoth]] || [[word:dhavahojoj|dhavahojoj]] || [[word:dhavahoshosh|dhavahoshosh]] || [[word:dhavah|dhavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavahotho|dhavahotho]] || [[word:dhavahojo|dhavahojo]] || [[word:dhavahosho|dhavahosho]] || [[word:dhavaho|dhavaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavahofoth|dhavahofoth]] || [[word:dhavahofoj|dhavahofoj]] || [[word:dhavahofosh|dhavahofosh]] || [[word:dhavahof|dhavahof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻf|dhavahĂŻf]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻf|dhavahĂŻf]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻf|dhavahĂŻf]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻf|dhavahĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻfĂŻf|dhavahĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻfĂŻf|dhavahĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻfĂŻf|dhavahĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻfĂŻf|dhavahĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻf|dhavahĂŻf]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻf|dhavahĂŻf]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻf|dhavahĂŻf]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻf|dhavahĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻf|dhavahĂŻf]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻf|dhavahĂŻf]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻf|dhavahĂŻf]] || [[word:dhavahĂŻf|dhavahĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhavahĂŠthĂŠ|dhavahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhavahĂŠjĂŠ|dhavahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhavahĂŠshĂŠ|dhavahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhavahĂŠ|dhavahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavahathath|dhavahathath]] || [[word:dhavahajaj|dhavahajaj]] || [[word:dhavahashash|dhavahashash]] || [[word:dhavah|dhavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavahatha|dhavahatha]] || [[word:dhavahaja|dhavahaja]] || [[word:dhavahasha|dhavahasha]] || [[word:dhavaha|dhavaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavahafath|dhavahafath]] || [[word:dhavahafaj|dhavahafaj]] || [[word:dhavahafash|dhavahafash]] || [[word:dhavahaf|dhavahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhavahasha|dhavahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhavahasha|godhavahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhavahasha|gokidhavahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhavahnĂŒasha|dhavahnĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhavahnknĂŒasha|godhavahnknĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhavahnĂŒasha|gokidhavahnĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhavahshĂ«asha|dhavahshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhavahnkshĂ«asha|godhavahnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhavahshĂ«asha|gokidhavahshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhavahroasha|dhavahroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhavahnkroasha|godhavahnkroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhavahroasha|gokidhavahroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhavahmuasha|dhavahmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhavahnkmuasha|godhavahnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhavahmuasha|gokidhavahmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhavahsherasha|dhavahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhavahnksherasha|godhavahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhavahsherasha|gokidhavahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhavahngasha|dhavahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhavahnkngasha|godhavahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhavahngasha|gokidhavahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhavahyaasha|dhavahyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhavahnkyaasha|godhavahnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhavahyaasha|gokidhavahyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhavahyamasha|dhavahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhavahnkyamasha|godhavahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhavahyamasha|gokidhavahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhavahnĂŒshĂ«asha|dhavahnĂŒshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhavahnknĂŒshĂ«asha|godhavahnknĂŒshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhavahnĂŒshĂ«asha|gokidhavahnĂŒshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhavahnĂŒroasha|dhavahnĂŒroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhavahnknĂŒroasha|godhavahnknĂŒroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhavahnĂŒroasha|gokidhavahnĂŒroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhavahnĂŒmuasha|dhavahnĂŒmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhavahnknĂŒmuasha|godhavahnknĂŒmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhavahnĂŒmuasha|gokidhavahnĂŒmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhavahshĂ«nĂŒasha|dhavahshĂ«nĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhavahnkshĂ«nĂŒasha|godhavahnkshĂ«nĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhavahshĂ«nĂŒasha|gokidhavahshĂ«nĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhavahshĂ«roasha|dhavahshĂ«roasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhavahnkshĂ«roasha|godhavahnkshĂ«roasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhavahshĂ«roasha|gokidhavahshĂ«roasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhavahshĂ«muasha|dhavahshĂ«muasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhavahnkshĂ«muasha|godhavahnkshĂ«muasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhavahshĂ«muasha|gokidhavahshĂ«muasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhavahronĂŒasha|dhavahronĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhavahnkronĂŒasha|godhavahnkronĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhavahronĂŒasha|gokidhavahronĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhavahroshĂ«asha|dhavahroshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhavahnkroshĂ«asha|godhavahnkroshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhavahroshĂ«asha|gokidhavahroshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhavahromuasha|dhavahromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhavahnkromuasha|godhavahnkromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhavahromuasha|gokidhavahromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhavahmunĂŒasha|dhavahmunĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhavahnkmunĂŒasha|godhavahnkmunĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhavahmunĂŒasha|gokidhavahmunĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhavahmushĂ«asha|dhavahmushĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhavahnkmushĂ«asha|godhavahnkmushĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhavahmushĂ«asha|gokidhavahmushĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhavahmuroasha|dhavahmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhavahnkmuroasha|godhavahnkmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhavahmuroasha|gokidhavahmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhavah|dhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dhĂŠvĂŠh|dhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhavah|hodhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodhĂŠvĂŠh|hodhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhavah|hohodhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhĂŠvĂŠh|hohodhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒdhavah|nĂŒdhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒdhĂŠvĂŠh|nĂŒdhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdhavah|nĂŒnĂŒdhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdhĂŠvĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒdhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻdhavah|nĂŻdhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻdhĂŠvĂŠh|nĂŻdhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdhavah|nĂŻnĂŻdhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdhĂŠvĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻdhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhavah|ludhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludhĂŠvĂŠh|ludhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhavah|luludhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhĂŠvĂŠh|luludhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhavah|lidhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidhĂŠvĂŠh|lidhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhavah|lilidhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhĂŠvĂŠh|lilidhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhavah|kodhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodhĂŠvĂŠh|kodhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhavah|kokodhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhĂŠvĂŠh|kokodhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhavah|kedhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedhĂŠvĂŠh|kedhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhavah|kekedhavah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhĂŠvĂŠh|kekedhĂŠvĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
